error[E0382]: use of moved value: `x`
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-06T18-03-03/gpt-4o/declarations/type_def_1/sample_001/target.rs:63:37

...

63 |         if (y.hi + y.lo) != (x.hi + x.lo) {
   |                                     ^^^^ value used here after move
   |
note: consider changing this parameter type in function `takes_range` to borrow instead if owning the value isn't necessary
